uin_code.source_quote: Product Name: Health Companion | Product UIN: MAXHLIP21509V042021

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: within 30 days from the ﬁrst Policy commencement date shall be excluded except claims arising due to an Accident, provided the same are covered.

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-existing Diseases (Code-Excl01) ... excluded until the expiry of 36 months (under Variant 2, Variant 3 Plans and Family First Policy)/ 48 months (under Variant 1 Plan) of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: expiry of 24 months of continuous coverage after the date of inception of the ﬁrst Policy with Us. This exclusion shall not be applicable for claims arising due to an Accident (covered from day 1) or Cancer (covered after 30-day w

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: We will not be liable to pay Pre-hospitalization Medical Expenses for more than 30 days immediately

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: We will not be liable to pay Post-hospitalization Medical Expenses for more than 60 days immediately

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Niva Bupa ReAssure 2.0 covers ~586 day care procedures)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: Any form of AYUSH Treatments, except as mentioned under Section 3.4.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity (Code-Excl18) a. Medical treatment expenses traceable to childbirth (including complicated deliveries and caesarean sections incurred during Hospitalization) except ectopic pregnancy;

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Living Organ Donor Transplant We will indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred for a living organ donor's Inpatient treatment for the harvesting of the organ donated provided that: a. The donation conforms to The Transplantation of Human Organs Act 1994

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: each Policy Year We will increase the Sum Insured applicable under the Policy by 20% of the Base Sum Insured of the immediately preceding Policy Year; subject up to maximum of 100% of the expiring Base Sum Insured.

restoration_benefit.source_quote: re-ﬁll amountas per Section 3.12 and No Claim Bonus as per Section 3.11 which is Our maximum, total and cumulative liability for any and all claims during the Policy Year in respect of the Insured Person.

network_hospital_count.source_note: 10,400+ cashless hospitals spanning 450+ cities across India (health-insurance-plans page, scraped 2026-05-15)

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless Facility means a facility extended by the insurer to the insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the insured in accordance with the policy terms and conditions, are directly made to the network

policy_type.source_quote: Inpatient Care We will indemnify the Medical Expenses incurred on the Insured Person's Hospitalization during the Policy Period following an Illness or Injury that occurs during the Policy Period

_meta.notes: Niva Bupa Health Companion: 30/60 pre/post hospitalization (shorter than ReAssure 2.0's 60/180). 3 Variants with PED varying 36/48 months.
